# UQ Reality Labs

UQ Reality Labs is Australia's first AR/VR student club at the University of Queensland, founded in 2022. The club runs workshops, exhibitions, networking events, and community activities for students interested in augmented, virtual, and mixed reality.

Official site: https://uqrealitylabs.github.io/

## Sections

- Home: UQ Reality Labs est. 2022
- About: Australia's first Augmented and Virtual Reality Club. UQ Union Best Faculty Club (EAIT) 2024. UQ Union Best Small Club 2023.
- Contact: LinkedIn, Instagram, Discord, and email at uqrealitylabs@gmail.com
- Sponsors: Companies that support the club
- Committee: President, Secretary, Treasurer, Events, Media, Workshop, and Industry roles

## Social profiles

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/uq-reality-labs
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/uqrealitylabs/
